accepted.reason: Mode-gated interpolation and boosted-spectrum integration provide rich numerical loops and control flow for conversion tasks.
Photon spectrum equations with domain checks and piecewise integration are high-quality scientific kernels.
C3 merge/linearization logic is a strong algorithmic example with list/set-heavy conflict resolution.
ASCII scan and latin1 key/value encoding are compact practical text-processing kernels.
Fenwick probability tree update/sample operations are classic performance-sensitive data-structure kernels.
Row-wise impurity accumulation over integer distributions is a clean tabular numeric reduction pattern.
3D Gaussian evaluation with value caching is a useful compute kernel with simple branch behavior.

skipped.reason: Thin Cassandra-driver wrapper around external C APIs; primarily binding glue rather than standalone optimization logic.
GC behavior regression test for Cython extension types, not a reusable algorithmic kernel.
Strongly tied to project-specific neuron/connection classes and memory layout, reducing standalone portability.
